productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Printed Green Tshirts
description: Composition Bottle green T-shirt made of 50% polyester and 50% cotton, has a ribbed crew neckline, short sleeves and rubber and graphic print lettering on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on print/embroidery; do not iron on decoration A bottle green T-shirt with graphic lettering from mark taylor makes for a great casual wear. The words "Rock U" in a combination of graphic and rubber print lettering shows the world that you live at your best. Pair it with jeans and canvas shoes. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.11', Shoulders-17.5"
